pages.title: User Funnel | User Engagement
pages.key_finding: Although user stickiness improved from 6.8% to 10.8%, overall Monthly Active Users declined from 82 to 37. A 54.9% drop-off in the funnel indicates a need to address onboarding retention.

pages.title: Game Performance (Score)
pages.key_finding: Game performance experienced a significant downturn, with the average daily score dropping by 66.8% from 87,248 in January to 28,986 in February.

pages.title: Game Performance (Time)
pages.key_finding: Player engagement time has declined significantly, with the average daily session dropping from 87 minutes in January to 32 minutes in February. This 63.1% decrease correlates with lower scores and indicates a critical loss of user interest.

pages.title: Most-played stages | Most-cooked menus
pages.key_finding: Users show a strong preference for 'Everyday Comfort Foods', with 'Umami Daily' being the top stage and ข้าวผัดหมู leading the menu choices, suggesting future content should focus on familiar, daily recipes.
